title: Polish Pickle & Chicken Soup (Zupa Ogórkowa) with Sour Cream & Dill | Marley Spoon
ingredients:
What we send


1 yellow onion



1 carrot



garlic



2 Yukon gold potatoes



10 oz pkg chicken breast strips



2 pkts chicken broth concentrate



1½ oz pkt Worcestershire sauce



¼ oz fresh dill



4 (1 oz) sour cream



3¼ oz dill pickles




What you'll need


kosher salt & ground pepper
olive oil
butter




What you'll use


medium Dutch oven or pot with lid





          Our veggies come straight from the farm, so please wash them before cooking.
